name: MQ-9 Reaper
description: Medium-altitude long-endurance armed remotely piloted aircraft. Primary US hunter-killer platform for counterterrorism and close air support missions.

specialAbilities.name: Persistent ISR
specialAbilities.description: Can loiter over target areas for 14+ hours providing continuous intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance.

specialAbilities.name: Precision Strike
specialAbilities.description: Hellfire missiles and GBU-12 Paveway II bombs enable surgical strikes with minimal collateral damage.
